summary: Frontend testing completed for draggable logo positioning feature on Bottle Preview page. All 10 test cases passed successfully. The logo can be dragged to reposition it on the bottle preview, X/Y coordinates update in real-time, position badge appears when not at center, and all reset buttons correctly reset the position.
passed_tests: Logo upload shows editing tools panel with new Position section
Position section displays X and Y coordinates (X: 50%, Y: 50% at center)
Reset to Center button present and disabled when logo is at center (50%, 50%)
Logo is draggable on bottle preview - moves smoothly following cursor
X and Y position values update in real-time during drag (tested: moved to 25%, 30%)
Position badge appears below preview when logo is not at center (shows 'Position: X%, Y%')
Reset to Center button becomes enabled when position is not center, clicking it returns logo to center
Reset Edits to Original button resets position back to center (50%, 50%)
Reset All button clears everything including logo and resets position
Drag functionality works on mobile viewport (tested with 390x844 viewport)
critical_code_review_comments: All drag event handlers (handleMouseDown, handleMouseMove, handleMouseUp) properly implemented with useCallback for optimization
Touch handlers (handleTouchStart, handleTouchMove, handleTouchEnd) mirror mouse handlers for mobile support
Position clamping (X: 10-90%, Y: 15-85%) ensures logo stays visible within bottle preview area
Reset position logic correctly resets to { x: 50, y: 50 } center position
data-testid attributes properly added: draggable-logo-container, reset-position-btn, bottle-preview-area
seed_data_creation: Used test_logo.png (100x100 blue PNG) created at /tmp/test_logo.png for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draggable logo feature is fully working. Logo position stored as percentages with center at (50, 50). Position badge appears below preview showing current position when not at center. All reset functions (Reset to Center, Reset Edits, Reset All) properly reset position. Touch events are implemented but native touch testing requires hasTouch browser context.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature is newly implemented and working correctly
